interfaces.name: getHomepageOverview
interfaces.description: Fetch content for the homepage including featured exhibitions, events, and special ticket offers.

interfaces.name: getVisitInfo
interfaces.description: Get general visit information including hours, location, directions, admission, and accessibility summary for the Visit page.

interfaces.name: getVisitGuidedTourFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for guided tours on the Visit page (day of week, day type, time of day, accessibility, languages).

interfaces.name: searchGuidedTourSchedules
interfaces.description: Search guided tour schedules with optional filters for tour, date range, day type, time of day, language, and accessibility.

interfaces.name: getGuidedTourDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific guided tour, including summary schedule information used on the Guided Tour Detail page.

interfaces.name: bookGuidedTourAndCreateOrder
interfaces.description: Create a tour booking for a selected schedule and immediately create a checkout order for it.

interfaces.name: getExhibitionsFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Exhibitions listing page.

interfaces.name: searchExhibitions
interfaces.description: Search exhibitions for the Exhibitions page using date range, admission type, family-friendliness, and sorting.

interfaces.name: addExhibitionToVisitPlan
interfaces.description: Add an exhibition to the user's visit plan (favorites). Creates a visit plan if one does not exist.

interfaces.name: removeExhibitionFromVisitPlan
interfaces.description: Remove an exhibition item from the user's visit plan.

interfaces.name: getVisitPlan
interfaces.description: Get the current user's visit plan with all saved exhibitions for the My Visit Plan page.

interfaces.name: getExhibitionDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific exhibition, including admission and visit plan status.

interfaces.name: getTicketFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Tickets & Admission page, including date range, exhibition types, time-of-day, and price range.

interfaces.name: searchExhibitionTicketSlots
interfaces.description: Search bookable exhibition ticket slots for a given date and filters on the Tickets & Admission page.

interfaces.name: createTicketBookingAndOrder
interfaces.description: Create a ticket booking for a selected slot and immediately create a checkout order for it.

interfaces.name: getEventsFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Events & Workshops page.

interfaces.name: searchEventsAndWorkshops
interfaces.description: Search upcoming events and workshops using date, time-of-day, price, and type filters.

interfaces.name: getEventDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific event or workshop for the Event Detail page.

interfaces.name: registerForEvent
interfaces.description: Register for an event or workshop with ticket quantities and a chosen payment option.

interfaces.name: getShopCategories
interfaces.description: Get the list of shop categories (e.g., Postcards & Prints) for the Shop page.

interfaces.name: getShopCategoryFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for a given shop category, including price range and rating options.

interfaces.name: searchProducts
interfaces.description: Search products within a shop category using price, rating, and sort filters.

interfaces.name: getProductDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific product for the Product Detail page.

interfaces.name: addProductToCart
interfaces.description: Add a product to the cart. Creates a cart if none exists.

interfaces.name: getCart
interfaces.description: Get the current cart with all items, totals, and product display information for the Cart page.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a cart item and return the updated cart summary.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the cart and return the updated cart summary.

interfaces.name: createCheckoutOrderForCart
interfaces.description: Create a checkout order for the current cart so the user can proceed to checkout for shop items.

interfaces.name: getMembershipFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Membership page.

interfaces.name: searchMembershipPlans
interfaces.description: Search membership plans by type, price, billing frequency, and sort order.

interfaces.name: startMembershipEnrollmentAndOrder
interfaces.description: Start a membership enrollment and immediately create a checkout order for payment.

interfaces.name: getDonationFunds
interfaces.description: Get the list of active donation funds or causes for the Support & Donate page.

interfaces.name: createDonation
interfaces.description: Create a donation to a specific fund with donor details and payment method. Processes payment for credit/debit card donations.

interfaces.name: subscribeToNewsletter
interfaces.description: Subscribe an email address to the gallery newsletter with topic, interests, and format preferences.

interfaces.name: getCheckoutOrder
interfaces.description: Get a checkout order summary for the Checkout page, including line items and totals.

interfaces.name: completeCheckoutPayment
interfaces.description: Complete checkout by submitting billing details and payment information, updating the checkout order status.

interfaces.name: getAboutContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About page, including mission, vision, history, and key programs.

interfaces.name: getContactInfo
interfaces.description: Get contact information for the Contact page, including address, phone numbers, emails, and hours summary.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit a general inquiry or feedback via the Contact page form.

interfaces.name: getPoliciesAndAccessibilityContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the Policies & Accessibility page including privacy, terms, accessibility, and visitor policies.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the single-user cart from storage and ensure it is initialized.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recalculate cart subtotal and total when items change.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateVisitPlan
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the single-user visit plan.

helperFunctions.name: _createCheckoutOrder
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to create a CheckoutOrder for a given reference entity (ticket booking, tour booking, cart, or membership enrollment).

helperFunctions.name: _applyProductFiltersAndSorting
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to apply price, rating, and sort filters to product queries.

helperFunctions.name: _applyEventFiltersAndSorting
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to apply date, time-of-day, price, and sort filters to event queries.

helperFunctions.name: _formatDateRangeLabel
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to format start and end dates into a human-readable date range string.
